libraries.name: Hemoglobin A1c Control for Patients with Diabetes
libraries.description: Assesses adults 18-75 with diabetes whose HbA1c was adequately controlled (<8.0%).

libraries.name: Breast Cancer Screening
libraries.description: Women 50-74 who had a mammogram to screen for breast cancer in the past two years.

libraries.name: Cervical Cancer Screening
libraries.description: Women 21-64 who were screened for cervical cancer.

libraries.name: Colorectal Cancer Screening
libraries.description: Adults 45-75 who had appropriate screening for colorectal cancer.

libraries.name: Annual Wellness Visit
libraries.description: Tracks completion of Medicare Annual Wellness Visit.
